ai_ml_engineer.title: AI/ML Engineer
ai_ml_engineer.education_required: B.Tech/B.Sc in CS, IT, or related

yearly_milestones.milestone: Learn Python, Mathematics, Statistics, and ML basics
yearly_milestones.action: Complete ML courses (Andrew Ng, fast.ai)

yearly_milestones.milestone: Build 3–5 ML projects; contribute to open source
yearly_milestones.action: Participate in Kaggle competitions

yearly_milestones.milestone: Land first AI/ML role (₹6–10 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Network on LinkedIn, apply via Naukri, LinkedIn

yearly_milestones.milestone: Specialize in NLP/CV/RL; get cloud certifications
yearly_milestones.action: AWS ML Specialty or GCP Professional ML

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior ML Engineer or Tech Lead (₹18–30 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Mentor juniors, lead projects, publish papers

yearly_milestones.milestone: Master DSA, one programming language, and web basics
yearly_milestones.action: Solve 200+ LeetCode problems, build 2 projects

yearly_milestones.milestone: Intern at a tech company; learn backend/frontend
yearly_milestones.action: Apply for FAANG internships or product startups

yearly_milestones.milestone: First full-time role (₹4–8 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Focus on product companies for better growth

yearly_milestones.milestone: Expertise in cloud, microservices, system design
yearly_milestones.action: Get AWS/Azure certification

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior SDE or Architect (₹15–30 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Start targeting FAANG or Series B+ startups

data_analyst.title: Data Analyst

yearly_milestones.milestone: Learn SQL, Excel, Python basics, and a BI tool
yearly_milestones.action: Complete Google Data Analytics certification

yearly_milestones.milestone: Build a portfolio of 3–4 data analysis projects
yearly_milestones.action: Publish projects on GitHub and Kaggle

yearly_milestones.milestone: First analyst role (₹3–6 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Leverage internship or fresher programs

yearly_milestones.milestone: Learn ML basics, A/B testing, and advanced SQL
yearly_milestones.action: Transition to data scientist or BI lead role

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior Analyst or Data Scientist (₹10–20 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Pursue specialized domain expertise

risks: Ceiling on growth without ML skills

product_manager.title: Product Manager

yearly_milestones.milestone: Understand product fundamentals; intern as SDE or analyst
yearly_milestones.action: Read Product books: Inspired by Marty Cagan

yearly_milestones.milestone: Transition to APM role via internal move or company program
yearly_milestones.action: Apply to Google APM, Myntra, Flipkart APM programs

yearly_milestones.milestone: Manage a product feature end-to-end (₹8–15 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Build product sense through side projects

yearly_milestones.milestone: Lead a product team; drive key business metrics
yearly_milestones.action: Network with PMs, attend product conferences

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior PM or Group PM (₹25–60 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Consider MBA from IIM for leadership roles

risks: Hard to break into without experience

cybersecurity_analyst.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
cybersecurity_analyst.education_required: B.Tech in CS/IT or relevant certifications

yearly_milestones.milestone: Learn networking, Linux, Python, and security basics
yearly_milestones.action: Get CompTIA Security+ certification

yearly_milestones.milestone: Practice ethical hacking on platforms like TryHackMe, HackTheBox
yearly_milestones.action: Get CEH or eJPT certification

yearly_milestones.milestone: First SOC or Security Analyst role (₹4–8 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Build home lab, practice CTF challenges

yearly_milestones.milestone: Specialize in Pen Testing, Cloud Security, or IR
yearly_milestones.action: Get OSCP or CISSP certification

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior Security Engineer or CISO track (₹18–45 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Lead security assessments, mentor team

yearly_milestones.milestone: Master Linux, Docker, Git, and scripting
yearly_milestones.action: Build sample pipelines, deploy apps on AWS free tier

yearly_milestones.milestone: Learn Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines
yearly_milestones.action: Get AWS SysOps or CKA certification

yearly_milestones.milestone: DevOps Engineer role (₹6–10 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Work on real infrastructure, automate deployments

yearly_milestones.milestone: Platform Engineer; multi-cloud expertise
yearly_milestones.action: Build internal developer platform tools

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior DevOps or SRE (₹20–40 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Lead reliability and scalability initiatives

yearly_milestones.milestone: Learn Figma, design principles, and UX research
yearly_milestones.action: Complete Google UX Design certificate

yearly_milestones.milestone: Build a portfolio of 4–5 case studies
yearly_milestones.action: Do freelance projects, contribute to open-source design

yearly_milestones.milestone: Junior UX Designer role (₹3–6 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Join design communities, network on Dribbble/Behance

yearly_milestones.milestone: Mid-level designer; own design system components
yearly_milestones.action: Learn motion design and accessibility

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior Designer or Design Lead (₹15–25 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Lead design thinking workshops, mentor juniors

yearly_milestones.milestone: Understand blockchain fundamentals, learn Solidity
yearly_milestones.action: Complete CryptoZombies, Buildspace courses

yearly_milestones.milestone: Build DApps, contribute to open-source protocols
yearly_milestones.action: Participate in hackathons (ETHGlobal, Devfolio)

yearly_milestones.milestone: Web3 Developer role or freelance (₹8–12 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Audit smart contracts, build DeFi projects

yearly_milestones.milestone: Protocol developer or security auditor
yearly_milestones.action: Specialize in ZK proofs or Layer 2 solutions

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior Blockchain Engineer or Protocol Lead
yearly_milestones.action: Lead protocol development, whitepaper contributions

yearly_milestones.milestone: Master SQL, Python, and data warehouse concepts
yearly_milestones.action: Learn Airflow, BigQuery, and AWS Glue

yearly_milestones.milestone: Build end-to-end data pipelines on real datasets
yearly_milestones.action: Get AWS Data Analytics or GCP Professional Data Engineer

yearly_milestones.milestone: Junior Data Engineer role (₹6–10 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Work on real-time streaming with Kafka

yearly_milestones.milestone: Mid-level DE; own complete data pipelines
yearly_milestones.action: Learn DBT and modern data stack

yearly_milestones.milestone: Senior Data Engineer or Data Architect (₹20–40 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Design enterprise data lakehouse architectures

yearly_milestones.milestone: Identify problem, validate idea, build MVP
yearly_milestones.action: Do customer interviews, launch on ProductHunt

yearly_milestones.milestone: Get first 100 paying customers
yearly_milestones.action: Apply to accelerators, pitch to angels

yearly_milestones.milestone: Raise seed funding or become profitable
yearly_milestones.action: Build a small team, scale product

yearly_milestones.milestone: Series A or strong PMF achieved
yearly_milestones.action: Scale go-to-market, expand to new markets

yearly_milestones.milestone: Scaling or strategic exit (acquisition/IPO track)
yearly_milestones.action: Focus on culture, hiring, and OKRs

yearly_milestones.milestone: Understand exam pattern, start NCERT foundation
yearly_milestones.action: Join coaching or start self-study with Vajiram/Vision IAS

yearly_milestones.milestone: Complete syllabus, solve previous year papers
yearly_milestones.action: Write mock tests, join answer writing batch

yearly_milestones.milestone: First attempt at exam
yearly_milestones.action: Analyze mistakes, revise weak areas

yearly_milestones.milestone: Clear Prelims + Mains
yearly_milestones.action: Prepare for Interview (Personality Test)

yearly_milestones.milestone: Final selection and posting (IAS/IPS/IFS)
yearly_milestones.action: Undergo training at LBSNAA

higher_studies_abroad.title: MS/PhD Abroad
higher_studies_abroad.education_required: B.Tech or B.Sc with strong GPA

yearly_milestones.milestone: Prepare GRE/IELTS; identify research areas; build profile
yearly_milestones.action: Score 320+ GRE, 7.5+ IELTS/TOEFL

yearly_milestones.milestone: Apply to 10–15 universities; get Letters of Recommendation
yearly_milestones.action: Write compelling SOP; target top 50 universities

yearly_milestones.milestone: Begin MS/PhD program; TA/RA position
yearly_milestones.action: Connect with advisor; publish research

yearly_milestones.milestone: Internship at Google/Microsoft/Meta during MS
yearly_milestones.action: Build strong network, publish 1–2 papers

yearly_milestones.milestone: Graduate; return to India or stay abroad
yearly_milestones.action: Apply for H1B (USA) or PR (Canada/Germany)

mba.title: MBA (IIM / Top Business School)

yearly_milestones.milestone: Prepare for CAT; work at a good company for profile
yearly_milestones.action: Score 99+ percentile CAT; build extracurriculars

yearly_milestones.milestone: Clear interviews at IIM (WAT-PI round)
yearly_milestones.action: Prepare group discussions and PI answers

yearly_milestones.milestone: Year 1 of MBA — cases, clubs, summers
yearly_milestones.action: Summer internship at consulting/finance firm

yearly_milestones.milestone: Year 2 — placements (₹15–50 LPA)
yearly_milestones.action: Target consulting (McKinsey, BCG), FMCG, or startup

yearly_milestones.milestone: Manager or senior role post-MBA
yearly_milestones.action: Build leadership, take P&L ownership

risks: ROI depends heavily on college tier

yearly_milestones.milestone: Build portfolio; complete first 3–5 projects
yearly_milestones.action: Offer discounted work initially for reviews

yearly_milestones.milestone: Consistent ₹1–3 lakh/month revenue
yearly_milestones.action: Specialize, increase rates, build repeat clients

yearly_milestones.milestone: Scale to premium projects or productize service
yearly_milestones.action: Create digital products, online courses, or retainer contracts

yearly_milestones.milestone: Build personal brand; hire subcontractors
yearly_milestones.action: Launch personal website, publish thought leadership

yearly_milestones.milestone: Agency founder or top-tier consultant
yearly_milestones.action: Transition to agency model or high-value consulting
